motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def concatHex36(self, n: int) -> str:
        hex_val = hex(n ** 2)[2:]
        base36_val = ''
        for i in range(3):
            digit = (n ** (3 - i)) % 36
            if digit < 10:
                base36_val = chr(ord('0') + digit) + base36_val
            else:
                base36_val = chr(ord('A') + digit - 10) + base36_val
        return hex_val + base36_val
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(n))
space complexity: O(log(n))
energy implications: LOW
